name: @meu-jarvis/planner-executor
description: Planner+Executor (Estágio 2+3 do pipeline AI multi-intent) — Planner invoca Claude Sonnet com tool calling sobre toolRegistry.getAnthropicToolDefinitions() (Story 2.3) com prompt-cache 'ephemeral' (Architecture §4.3 ~90% cost saving). Executor é thin wrapper sobre executeAtomic (Story 2.3) que valida tool names (D8 defense-in-depth) e delega atomicidade Postgres. Source-only. Consumido pelas Stories 2.6 (endpoint /api/agent/prompt), 2.10 (LLM Benchmark E2E).
